scripts.test:coverage: mkdir -p coverage && NODE_V8_COVERAGE=coverage node --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-lines=80 --test-coverage-functions=80 --test-coverage-branches=70 --test-coverage-include=src/**/*.js | tee coverage/summary.txt
scripts.quality:gate: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test:coverage && npm run build:validate
scripts.ci: npm run quality:gate && npm run security:audit
